data.current_summary: Parse a web page with pre-fetched HTML
data.current_description: Parse content from pre-fetched HTML. Useful when you have already fetched the page content and want Mercury to extract the article from it without fetching the URL again.
data.description_suggestion: Extract article content, metadata, and structured information from pre-fetched HTML. Accepts HTML content directly via POST request body, eliminating the need for Mercury to fetch the URL. Returns the same ParseResult as the parseUrl endpoint, including article title, author, published date, excerpt, lead image, and full content. Useful when you have already fetched the page or need to parse HTML from non-standard sources.
